steps.title: Spot the passage structure
steps.content: The passage makes a broad claim (“other animals also find tools helpful”) and immediately follows it with specific examples. The underlined sentence is the first of these examples, positioned right after the general claim.

steps.title: Identify which choice names the correct function
steps.content:
Choice C accurately names this function—it provides one example of tool use in a nonhuman animal. The other choices either misidentify the subject (A, about humans) or impose comparisons (B and D) that the sentence doesn't make.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
